examples: Openly gay Ellen DeGeneres (No. 10) has brought lesbianism to the mainstream with massive platforms on TV, Twitter and Facebook.
Though this should be of no more than passing interest, Ms. di Florio repeatedly flirts with the question of lesbianism without providing the answer.
This, combined with the trivial observation that not all lesbians have twin brothers, suggests that if male hormones are inducing lesbianism, they are coming from elsewhere.
